title: Advanced HeroQuest - Lets Play - Intro
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eK7uM-EeLIk

Daniel kicks off a let's play mini-series of Advanced HeroQuest, rolling up a fresh quest and assembling his party for a dungeon delve into Skaven-infested corridors. This introductory episode covers character creation, quest generation, and the setup process — the dice-driven scaffolding that makes every Advanced HeroQuest campaign unique before a single door is opened.

The quest? A betrayal scenario. The objective? Retrieve a magical lantern stolen from a village — one that repels the rat-men below. The tone is casual, enthusiastic, and refreshingly honest about the game's quirks. Expect house rules, improvisation, and an audio quality apology.

----

Do you prefer campaign-driven dungeon crawls or one-shot procedural dives?
